case_title: ANDREW ROLFES ET AL VS. 21ST CENTURY HOME IMPROVEMENT PAINTING & ROOFING

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF ROLFES, ANDREW ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS, ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ANDREW ROLFES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF HILDAGUARD ROLFES IS NOT PRESENT, BUT REPRESENTED BY ANDREW ROLFES IS HIS MOTHER'S CARE GIVER. DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY HOME IMPORVEMENT PAINTING & ROOFING IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARCUS NEWBURY. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY HOME IMPROVEMENT PAINTING & ROOFING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED OCT-17-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY HOME IMPROVEMENT PAINTING & ROOFING
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY HOME IMPROVEMENT PAINTING & ROOFING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2019 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ROLFES, ANDREW ROLFES, HILDEGARD AS TO DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY HOME IMPROVEMENT PAINTING & ROOFING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROLFES, ANDREW ROLFES, HILDEGARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY HOME IMPROVEMENT PAINTING & ROOFING $8,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,915.00, COURT FINDS DEFENDANT PAINTING WORK WAS DEFECTIVE AND BREACHES THEIR WRITTEN WARRANTY. DEFENDANT ATTEMPTED WITHOUT SUCCESS TO CORRECT THE PAINTING WORK THEY DID ORIGINALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
